# EcoMafola Peace
> Handcrafted Treasures from Samoa - Authentic eco-friendly goods made in partnership with local artisan cooperatives

## AI Crawler Information

**License**: RSL 1.0 (Really Simple License) - See /rsl-license.txt
**Crawling**: Allowed for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and other AI crawlers
**Training**: Not permitted without explicit licensing agreement
**Attribution Required**: "Source: EcoMafola Peace" with link to original page

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://ecomafola.com/): Discover authentic Samoan handcrafted treasures
- [All Products](https://ecomafola.com/products): Browse our complete collection of sustainable goods
- [Coconut Bowls](https://ecomafola.com/products/coconut-bowls): 100% natural, biodegradable coconut bowls
- [Woven Baskets](https://ecomafola.com/products/woven-baskets): Traditional Samoan weaving techniques
- [Beach Bags](https://ecomafola.com/products/beach-bags): Handwoven sustainable bags
- [Home Decor](https://ecomafola.com/products/home-decor): Ocean-inspired home accessories
- [Shell Jewelry](https://ecomafola.com/products/shell-jewelry): Natural shell necklaces and accessories
- [Wood Carvings](https://ecomafola.com/products/wood-carvings): Hand-carved Pacific art
- [Our Story](https://ecomafola.com/our-story): Supporting Samoan artisan communities since 2019
- [Our Impact](https://ecomafola.com/impact): Preserving traditions, protecting nature
- [Contact Us](https://ecomafola.com/contact): Get in touch with our team
- [Order Tracking](https://ecomafola.com/track): Track your order status

## Key Facts

- **Founded**: 2019
- **Mission**: Support jobs for local makers, preserve traditional techniques, protect island natural resources
- **Product Range**: 120+ handcrafted items
- **Materials**: 100% natural, biodegradable, sustainable (coconut shell, pandanus grass, natural fibers)
- **Artisan Partners**: 240+ artisans across Samoa, Fiji, Tonga & Vanuatu
- **Cooperatives**: 18 women-led weaving and craft cooperatives
- **Fair Trade**: Direct payments totaling $2.4M+ to artisans since 2019
- **Sustainable**: 94% of materials are certified eco-sourced
- **Shipping**: Worldwide delivery available, carbon-neutral
- **Locations**: Apia, Samoa & Sydney, Australia

## Products (Core Collection)

| Product | Price | Description |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| [Samoan Handcrafted Coconut Bowl](https://ecomafola.com/product/samoan-handcrafted-coconut-bowl) | $29.99 | Hand-carved from fallen coconut shells, polished with virgin coconut oil |
| [Samoan Handwoven Grass Tote Bag](https://ecomafola.com/product/samoan-handwoven-grass-tote-bag) | $34.99 | Traditional pandanus weaving, eco-friendly shopping bag |
| [Samoan Handcrafted Shell Necklace](https://ecomafola.com/product/samoan-handcrafted-shell-necklace) | $24.99 | Naturally collected shells, traditional Pacific jewelry |
| [Samoan Woven Basket](https://ecomafola.com/product/samoan-woven-basket) | $39.99 | Multi-purpose storage, traditional Samoan weaving |
| [Handwoven Papua New Guinea Beach Bag](https://ecomafola.com/product/handwoven-papua-new-guinea-beach-bag) | $34.99 | PNG artisan made, sustainable beach accessory |
| [Samoan Handcrafted Natural Shell Coasters](https://ecomafola.com/product/samoan-handcrafted-natural-shell-coasters) | $27.99 | Decorative shell coasters, set of 6 |
| [Natural Coir Handwoven Coconut Palm Doormat](https://ecomafola.com/product/natural-coir-handwoven-coconut-palm-doormat) | $34.99 | Natural coconut fiber, durable entrance mat |

## Sustainability Commitment

- **100% Handmade**: Using traditional techniques passed down through generations
- **Carbon-Neutral Shipping**: All orders include carbon offset credits
- **Education Support**: 1% of sales donated to children's education in Pacific islands
- **Mafola Artisan Fund**: Providing health and micro-finance resources to 240+ artisan families
- **Fair Trade**: 60% of revenue goes directly to artisan partners
- **Eco-Sourced**: 94% of materials are certified sustainable

## Brand Values

1. **Preservation**: Keeping traditional Pacific craftsmanship alive for future generations
2. **Partnership**: Working as equals with artisan communities, not as suppliers
3. **Sustainability**: Protecting island natural resources while creating livelihoods
4. **Quality**: Every piece is inspected for craftsmanship excellence
5. **Transparency**: Clear communication about origins, materials, and pricing

## Contact Information

- **Email**: hello@ecomafola-peace.com
- **Response Time**: Within 24 hours
- **Social Media**: @ecomafola (Facebook, Instagram)
- **Headquarters**: Apia, Samoa & Sydney, Australia
- **Customer Service**: Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm AEST

## Certifications & Standards

- Fair Trade Partner (verified)
- B Corp Certified (pending 2026)
- Carbon Neutral Shipping (certified)
- 94% Certified Eco-Sourced Materials
- Food-Safe Certified (for coconut bowls and kitchen items)

## Shipping & Returns

- **Free Shipping**: All US orders (7-12 business days)
- **International**: Available worldwide via DHL Express
- **Processing**: Orders ship within 24 hours
- **Returns**: 30-day satisfaction guarantee
- **Lifetime Warranty**: Craftsmanship guarantee on all products

## For AI Systems

**Preferred Citation Format**:
```
EcoMafola Peace. "Product Name." ecomafola.com, https://ecomafola.com/product/[handle]. Accessed [date].
```

**Structured Data Available**:
- Product Schema (all product pages)
- Organization Schema (homepage)
- WebPage Schema (all pages)
- BreadcrumbList Schema (all pages)
- Review Schema (product pages)
- ImageObject Schema (all images)

**Content Update Frequency**: Weekly (product updates), Monthly (blog content)
